node.html: Architected an end-to-end Intelligent Candidate Ranking Pipeline using a 4-bit quantized Qwen-2.5 (1.5B) via Llama.cpp and BGE-Small embeddings, automating structured intent extraction and semantic retrieval from raw Job Descriptions. Engineered a dual-vector semantic scoring pipeline with a custom skills-grounding engine and honeypot filters to detect synthetic profiles. Optimized CPU inference to achieve a 1,700+ candidates/second processing throughput.

Developed a transformer-based classification system utilizing BERT to predict disaster-related tweets. Achieved a validation accuracy of 84.06% (Rank #71 on Kaggle leaderboard) by implementing custom text-cleaning and regex preprocessing pipelines and fine-tuning model hyperparameters.

Retrieval-Augmented Generation campus intelligence system answering academic and admissions queries. Combines FAQs with dynamic web scraping, FAISS semantic vector search, HuggingFace embeddings, and low-latency Groq LLaMA 3.1 inference.

Applies a Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) reinforcement learning agent to simulate optimal liquidation schedules. Minimizes implementation shortfall by balancing market risk against Almgren-Chriss mathematical solutions.

Engineered a persona-driven AI chatbot using LangChain and LLMs to generate highly contextual, character-consistent responses. Integrated sliding-window conversational memory and custom prompt templates to minimize hallucination rates.
